name: Grapes with Yogurt Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 ripe small banana, peeled and sliced
1 1/2 cups red seedless grapes, rinsed and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the banana with the yogurt and season with a small amount of superfine sugar and a dash of rum.
2. Spoon the mixture into the bottom of wine glasses.
3. Place grapes on top of the yogurt sauce.
4. Garnish with mint or pistachio nuts.
Yield: 2 servings
